name: Bouldercombe Battery project
notable: 50 MW / 100 MWh Tesla Megapack BESS near Gladstone, QLD. Genex Power's first large-scale BESS, operated under Tesla Autobidder offtake. Two Megapack units damaged in fire during September 2023 commissioning — Tesla bore replacement costs. 40 Megapack 2.0 units. Full COD December 2023.

timeline.title: Fire during commissioning — grid-side, not Megapack
timeline.detail: A fire occurred during commissioning but investigation confirmed it ignited on the grid infrastructure side (HV transformer area), not within any Tesla Megapack unit.

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: Commercial operations — delivered on budget despite fire
timeline.detail: Genex's 50MW/100MWh Bouldercombe Battery (40 Tesla Megapacks) entered commercial operations, delivered on budget despite the commissioning fire.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

timeline_events.title: J-POWER completes 100% acquisition of Genex Power
timeline_events.detail: AUD $351M takeover. All Genex projects now under J-POWER ownership.

stages.name: Stage 1 (BBP)
stages.notes: Tesla Megapack 2.0. Operational since Nov 2023. Autobidder revenue-sharing offtake.

stages.name: Stage 2 (BBP 2)
stages.notes: Confirmed in Genex Power pipeline. AEMO KCI entry.
